flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lincoln University rose 51% between 2006 and 2009 ($4.1k → $6.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Lincoln University fell 42% between 2021 and 2024 (17.7% → 10.3%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Lincoln University fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (25.6% → 20.8%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lincoln University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.4k → $17.7k).
